text: Nex works late and breaks into the CEO's office. He downloads proof: Midori Food has been transporting fake solar cells designed to fail simultaneously — the cause of the city blackout. Kelly arrives with agents Katana and Falchion to seize the silver eggs.

speaker: Benedict Vanderbilt
text: Inside the chicken coop: Benedict Vanderbilt himself. He slaughters his own chickens, destroying the evidence. As Kelly confronts him about the ancient right to seize silver reserves, he smiles — and releases his servant, a Magma Djinn, directly at Nex.
